title: Board Member Communication with Schools
description: Board members play an important role in the district, but they act on behalf of the community as a whole rather than as individual decision-makers. This policy sets guidelines for how board members communicate with school staff and administrators, helping to ensure that day-to-day school operations run smoothly without undue outside influence. For parents and community members, it helps clarify the appropriate channels for raising concerns and reinforces that the board functions as a governing body, not as individual supervisors of school employees.
